tasks.message: YO BOYS 🚨 daily skidmark check!! drop ur drawers and report back. this is a MANDATORY inspection, The Creator demands it. no exceptions. not u Cody ur already used to dealing with s*** in ur pants get ready for fatherhood bro 💀
